DISCOVERY 612, PRESENT: ALBERT FINCH, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTIES, DENNIS HOM, DIEBOLD, INC. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, FIRST REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, AND REQUEST FOR STATEMENT OF DAMAGES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $675, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
